add.tapToSelect: Tap a category to select it

history.title: Activity
history.addFirst: Add your first expense or income
history.deleteMessage: This transaction will be deleted. Long press to delete.

settings.title: Settings
settings.recalculateXPMessage: Recomputes your total XP from completed quests and earned badges. Useful if your XP is abnormally high after a bug. Keeps your quests, badges and transactions.
settings.resetMessage: All your data will be permanently deleted: transactions, accounts, categories, and settings. This action cannot be undone.

budget.editCurrentMonthOnly: Only modifies the current month's threshold. Past months remain unchanged.
budget.currentMonthBudgetsInfo: The thresholds shown apply to the current month ({{month}}). Past months remain unchanged.
budget.exceededBanner: Budget {{category}} exceeded · Stay vigilant this month!
budget.warningMessage: You spent {{spent}} out of {{limit}} this month in this category.
budget.exceededMessage: You used {{spent}} out of {{limit}}. You exceeded your budget by {{over}}.
budget.deleteCategoryHasTransactions: This category has {{count}} transactions, including those from previous months. What do you want to do with them?
budget.deleteMoveExplanation: Move & delete: all transactions (current and past months) are reassigned to the "Other" category, then this category is deleted.
budget.deleteAllExplanation: Delete all: this category and all its transactions, including those from past months, are permanently deleted.

account.name: Account name
account.limitMessage: You have reached the limit of {{max}} custom accounts.
account.deleteWarning: All associated transactions will also be deleted.

category.name: Category name
category.limitMessage: You have reached the limit of {{max}} custom categories.

currency.conversionInfo: This action requires an internet connection to fetch exchange rates.
currency.convertInfo: All your balances will be converted from {{from}} to {{to}}.

planification.title: Planification
planification.emptyMessage: Create a planification to prepare your purchases in advance
planification.deleteItemConfirm: Do you want to delete this item?
planification.validatedMessage: This planification has been validated and purchases have been deducted from the balance.
planification.deleteTransactionMessage: This transaction will be removed from the planification.

onboarding.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
onboarding.enterBalances: Enter your current balances for each account
onboarding.balanceRequired: Please enter at least one balance
onboarding.balanceSubtitle: No need to be exact to the cent. We'll refine it together.

welcome.title: Ready to take control of your finances?
welcome.subtitle: A few quick questions to personalize your experience

quiz.q1Title: What's your biggest frustration with money?
quiz.q1Subtitle: Be honest, this stays between us
quiz.q1_dont_know_where: I don't know where my money goes
quiz.q1_stress: I stress when I think about my finances
quiz.q1_plan_better: I'd like to plan my spending better
quiz.q2Title: How long has this been going on?
quiz.q2_always: As long as I can remember
quiz.q3Title: What would change if you controlled your finances?

empathy.searchSpeech: Hmm, let me take a closer look...
empathy.resultSpeech: Found it! Here's what I think about you
empathy.headline_dont_know_where: 72% of people don't know where their money goes
empathy.headline_plan_better: Planning is already taking back control
empathy.statDefault: Most people who start tracking their expenses see improvement within 30 days.
empathy.stat_dont_know_where: Users who track expenses save on average 20% more per month.
empathy.stat_hard_to_save: Tracking every expense helps identify invisible money leaks.
empathy.stat_stress: Having a clear view of your finances reduces stress by 40%.
empathy.stat_plan_better: People who plan reach their financial goals 2x more often.
empathy.message: The good news? You just took the first step. And Mitsitsy is here to help you.
empathy.personalizedMessage: You've been dealing with this for {{duration}}. You want {{goal}}. The good news? You just took the first step.
empathy.cta: See how Mitsitsy can help me

solution.title: How Mitsitsy will help you
solution.subtitle: Here's what we've prepared for you
solution.benefit1Desc_dont_know_where: Charts by category to see exactly where your money goes
solution.benefit2Desc_dont_know_where: Never let an expense go unrecorded
solution.benefit3Desc_dont_know_where: Track how your spending evolves month by month
solution.benefit1Desc_hard_to_save: See your balance evolve in real time
solution.benefit2Desc_hard_to_save: Plan your expenses and stick to your budget
solution.benefit3Desc_hard_to_save: Identify expenses to cut and save more
solution.benefit1Desc_stress: All your finances at a glance, no surprises
solution.benefit2Desc_stress: Understand your habits to regain confidence
solution.benefit1Desc_plan_better: Prepare your purchases and anticipate expenses
solution.benefit2Desc_plan_better: Group your planned expenses by planification
solution.benefit3Desc_plan_better: Validate your plans and track your progress

wow.title: Try it yourself!
wow.subtitle: Tap each expense to see Mitsitsy in action
wow.successMessage: Great! See how easy it is?
wow.bubuleCongrats: Great job! See how easy it is to track your expenses!

tutorial.finalMessage: Your financial peace of mind starts now.

tooltips.balanceTapToHide: Tip: Tap on your balance to hide/show the amount

changelog.factoryReset: You can now reset the app to factory state from settings
changelog.deleteTransactions: Delete a transaction by tapping the trash icon
changelog.whatsNewPage: See what's new with every update
changelog.performanceOptimizations: The app is faster and smoother
changelog.malagasyLanguage: The app is now available in Malagasy
changelog.darkMode: Dark mode for comfortable use at night
changelog.feedbackModal: Share your ideas and suggestions directly in the app
changelog.currencyConversion: Switch currencies easily with live exchange rates
changelog.multipleAccounts: Manage multiple accounts: bank, cash and more
changelog.transferBetweenAccounts: Transfer money between your accounts in one tap
changelog.planificationSystem: Plan your expenses ahead of time
changelog.planificationGrouping: Planification transactions are grouped into a single card
changelog.autoDeleteEmptyPlanification: Planification is automatically deleted when all its transactions are removed
changelog.deleteModalNames: Names now display correctly in delete confirmation modals
changelog.gamificationSystem: Gamification system: earn XP and level up by tracking your finances
changelog.streaksAndChallenges: Daily streaks and challenges to keep you motivated
changelog.badgesAndAchievements: Badges and achievements to unlock as you manage your money
changelog.xpAndLevels: XP and level system with progress bar
changelog.dailyChallenges: Daily challenge to stay on top of your finances
changelog.gamificationNotifications: Smart notifications: streak reminders, daily challenges and weekly summary
changelog.reportsScreen: Reports screen: trend charts, category breakdown and detailed stats
changelog.calendarScreen: Expense calendar: view your spending day by day
changelog.reducedRedundancy: Cleaner interface with less repeated data across screens
changelog.transferFilter: Transfer filter now correctly shows transfers
changelog.transferNotCountedAsExpense: Transfers are no longer counted as expenses
changelog.bubuleMascot: Meet Bubule, your mascot and guide!
changelog.bubuleOnboarding: Bubule guides you through the entire onboarding
changelog.bubuleWowMoment: Bubule congratulates you when you complete the mini report
changelog.budgetLimits: Set a monthly budget per category to better control your spending
changelog.budgetCards: Visual tracking with colored progress bars (green, orange, red)
changelog.categoryDetailPage: Category detail page with history and month navigation
changelog.budgetWarnings: Automatic alert when you approach or exceed your budget
changelog.dashboardBudgets: Monthly budgets section on dashboard with overspend banner
changelog.settingsRedesign: Redesigned settings with page navigation and vector icons
changelog.reportsWithBudget: Enhanced reports with budget progress bars per category
changelog.rateAppButton: Rate the app directly on Google Play from settings
changelog.newBadges22: 22 new badges to unlock (streaks, financial mastery, exploration, volume)
changelog.questMasterBadge: Legendary "Quest Master" badge with +2000 XP bonus
changelog.longTermQuests: 5 multi-step long-term quests: Marathon, Collector, Discipline, Architect, Explorer
changelog.epicQuests: 5 epic endgame quests unlocked after completing the main quests
changelog.newDailyChallenges: 5 new daily challenges: early bird, no-spend day, stay under budget…
changelog.weeklyChallenges: Weekly challenges with generous XP rewards (150-300 XP)
changelog.monthlyChallenges: Monthly challenges for long-term goals (500-800 XP)
changelog.featureUnlocks: Badges now unlock new category slots, account slots and streak freezes
changelog.premiumThemes: 6 premium themes to unlock: Gold, Platinum, Midnight, Ruby, Emerald, Prism
changelog.featureUnlockedModal: Celebration animation whenever a feature is unlocked
changelog.upcomingUnlocksSection: "Upcoming unlocks" section to track your nearest goals
changelog.questProgressNotif: Reminders when a quest is almost complete
changelog.tabBarRefonte: Redesigned tab bar: central floating + button and new Achievements tab
changelog.achievementsRefonte: Achievements page redesigned with Challenges / Quests / Badges tabs and filters
changelog.settingsInHeader: Settings now accessible from the dashboard ⚙ icon, What's New moved into Settings
changelog.premiumUIRedesign: Redesigned interface with a premium look
changelog.speechBubbleDesign: Speech bubbles matching your theme colors
changelog.emptyStatesWithBubule: Bubule appears on empty screens to motivate you
changelog.v2DesignPolish: V2 design refined and polished across the entire app
changelog.roseTheme: New rose theme for a softer look
changelog.bottomSheetRefresh: Refreshed bottom sheets and popups with smoother animations
changelog.notificationFreqLabels: Reminder frequency labels now match the real behavior (every 1h / 2h / 4h)
changelog.feedbackSimplified: Cleaner feedback section: contact and feature suggestion in a single button
changelog.facebookPage: Follow Mitsitsy on Facebook directly from the app
changelog.accountAddButton: Quick + button to add an account from the accounts settings page
changelog.customCategoryLabel: Clearer custom category count in the settings home
changelog.xpSpamFix: Fixed XP spam on the Achievements page

locked.accountBody: You've hit the custom account limit. Earn the "Planner" badge by completing 5 planifications to unlock an extra slot.
locked.categoryBody: You've hit the custom category limit. Earn the "Budget Master" (3 clean months) or "Budget Legend" (6 clean months) badges to unlock extra slots.
locked.themeBody: This is a premium theme. Complete quests and earn the required badges to unlock it.
